contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: tribomirimbahia/capoeira repo split — relocate practice content
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/capoeira/pull/4
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tribomirimbahia/pull/3
  
  Details:
  Architectural cleanup after Phase 1A.
  
  Gary clarified the repo split: capoeira owns ALL practice content (moves, music,
  video clips, JS site); tribomirimbahia is the ledger & transparency layer ONLY.
  
  Earlier in this same session I had landed the 39 Bico Duro per-move clips in
  tribomirimbahia/data/. Two follow-up PRs to fix the location:
  
  1. TrueSightDAO/capoeira#4 — replaced 12-move BigModel placeholder data/moves.json
     with the real 39 Bico Duro moves; added move_metadata.json,
     segmentation_plan.json, youtube_videos.json, scripts/upload_clips_to_youtube.py.
     Updated capoeira/README.md to reflect the real Phase 1A pipeline (yt-dlp →
     faster-whisper PT word-level → ffmpeg cut → upload).
  
  2. TrueSightDAO/tribomirimbahia#3 — removed those same files; refocused
     AGENT_BRIEF.md on Phase 4 (Stripe donations, treasury-cache ledger,
     transparency explorer); collapsed historical Phase 1/2/3 sections into a
     <details> archaeology block with pointers to the capoeira repo.
  
  No new code shipped; this is purely an architectural relocation. Practice
  content keeps the YouTube URLs and live videos on admin@truesight.me.
  
  Memory updated to reflect the new split.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
